new_classes.label_en: other spirituous beverage in containers > 2 L (CN 2208 90 78)
new_classes.label_de: andere alkoholhaltige Getränke in Behältnissen > 2 L (KN 2208 90 78)
new_classes.definition_en: Spirituous beverages of heading 2208 falling under the residual 'other' category (i.e. not arrack, plum/pear/cherry brandy, other fruit spirit, or other named spirit), presented in containers of a nominal volume exceeding 2 litres. Classified under CN 2208 90 78 by analogy with subheading 2208 90 69 (small container equivalent) per the explanatory note.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for CN 2208 90 78 is minimal: it designates "other spirituous beverages" and cross-references the explanatory note for subheading 2208 90 69. The key discriminating criteria that CAN be captured are: (1) the product is a spirituous beverage of heading 2208 in a residual "other" category (modelled as a subclass of SpiritousBeverage2208), and (2) the container volume exceeds 2 litres (modelled via BFO has_part some LargeContainer). What CANNOT be fully captured without the referenced 2208 90 69 note text is: the precise list of excluded spirit types that define the "other" residual scope (tequila, mezcal, agave spirits not covered elsewhere, etc.), and any alcohol-strength thresholds that may apply per that note. The sibling relationship with OtherSpiritousBeverage22089069 (small-container equivalent) is implicit via shared parent but not formally axiomatised as a disjointness on container size. Coverage is therefore partial (~0.55).
